scripts.build: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.prisma.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm run prisma:migrate:reset && node scripts/run-vitest.mjs
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @turnkeyai/involute-shared build && pnpm run prisma:generate && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.prisma.json
